systems.system_notes: Primary total hip arthroplasty platform built around the POLARSTEM femoral system and the R3 acetabular system.

trays.tray_notes: Official Smith+Nephew hip materials describe flexible instrumentation for the R3 acetabular system and the POLARSTEM hip reconstruction system.

components.component_notes: Official product materials describe the POLARSTEM hip reconstruction system as the stem family within the solution.
Official product materials describe the R3 acetabular system as the cup platform within the solution.
Official product materials describe highly cross-linked polyethylene liner options for the R3 acetabular system.
Official product materials describe OXINIUM oxidized zirconium heads as part of the bearing construct.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The official product pages define the construct clearly but this pass does not expose a direct public SKU table.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper brochure or IFU pass is needed for product-code level detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction stays at tray and implant-family level only.
